## Summary
- Describe what changed and why.

## Security Checklist
- [ ] I validated all new user inputs.
- [ ] I did not add hardcoded secrets.
- [ ] I reviewed logs to ensure no secrets are printed.

## Testing Checklist
- [ ] I ran `npm run check` locally.
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the change.

## Deployment Notes
- Any infrastructure, Cloudflare, Docker, or environment changes required.
